{{Infobox location
| name = Dark Space
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Dark Space Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Dark Space is a vast frontier of the galaxy that encompasses all territory not claimed by other major powers. It is significantly larger than any of the other three galactic corners combined, serving as a mysterious region for adventure. The area is situated on the edge of known space, with the [[Alliance]]'s nearest system being [[Fifty-Three X]]. Because it exists outside established boundaries, Dark Space is home to various splinter factions, including groups from the [[Galactic Union]] takeover that fled there to rebuild their strength. It is also a known habitat for certain [[Subspace]] creatures and the star-eating psychic insect [[Esh’kinaar]]. While it is a distinct region, it is often associated with the borders of [[Subspace]], which can manifest as a dark surface or a swirling, multicolored expanse.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Dark Space serves as the territory belonging to the [[Iron Legion]], a group whose [[life]]-supporting planets are scattered throughout the region. Following the death of the previous [[Iron King]], the [[Legion]] was broken into splinters and dispersed across this expanse. An archaeological dig was once reported occurring on the very border of the area. Currently, a ship is positioned at this edge, with its location clearly marked on a map relative to the boundary of Dark Space.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An archaeological dig was reported on the border of [[Dark Space]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Iron Legion]] was reduced to splinters and scattered across [[Dark Space]] after the death of the previous [[Iron King]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18">''The Captain'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Dark Space]] is a location where the [[Iron Legion]] belongs.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Iron Legion]]'s [[life]]-supporting planets are scattered throughout [[Dark Space]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The ship is at the border of [[Dark Space]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The map shows the ship's location relative to the edge of [[Dark Space]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Dark Space]] is a long stretch of space located after the [[Kallver System]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c27">''The Engineer'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Dark Space]] is a place where one could potentially land and hide.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32">''The Engineer'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Dark Space serves as the destination for the [[D’Niss]] swarms and is a region where entities may experience hunger. A specific sector exists on the edge of this location, which is also believed to be a place from which [[Sel’miroth]] may have returned. Currently, the [[D’Niss]] incursion is taking place on the edge of Dark Space and is treated as originating from within it. Furthermore, [[Esh’kinaar]] is known to lurk inside Dark Space.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Dark Space]] is a location where the [[D’Niss]] swarms have headed.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Dark Space]] is a location where entities might get hungry.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|There is a sector on the edge of [[Dark Space]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Dark Space]] is a location from which [[Sel’miroth]] may have returned.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16">''The Knight'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[D’Niss]] incursion is occurring on the edge of [[Dark Space]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[D’Niss]] incursion is treated as coming from [[Dark Space]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] lurks in [[Dark Space]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dark Space]] contains billions of planets.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dark Space]] borders the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
